The '''Saurton system''' was a single-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]]. It was home to the planet [[Essowyn]], and two [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belts]], the [[Kanawyn Belt]] and [[Greawyn Belt]].

{{System-stub}}
